name: MoneyGram
description_short: MoneyGram is a money transfer service with 42+ locations across Atlanta, operating through partner retailers like CVS, Walmart, and Ace Cash Express for convenient fund sending and receiving.
description_long:
MoneyGram is an established money transfer service that operates through a network of third-party retail partners rather than company-owned locations. The company facilitates domestic and international money transfers, allowing customers to send and receive funds both online and in-person. With 42 search results in Atlanta alone, MoneyGram has extensive geographic coverage through partnerships with major retailers including CVS Pharmacy, Walmart, Ace Cash Express, and independent check-cashing businesses. This partnership model enables MoneyGram to maintain a broad physical footprint without managing its own storefronts.

MoneyGram's service offerings center on money transfer capabilities, with both online and offline options available to consumers. Customers can manage transfers through the company's website or visit partner locations to send or receive money in person. The service is designed for convenience, with extended operating hours at many partner locations—some open until 11:00 PM—and a straightforward location finder tool on their website. The company provides phone support through partner locations and a centralized customer service line.

The primary distinction of MoneyGram is its extensive partner network, which provides accessibility across multiple retail environments rather than requiring customers to visit dedicated financial service centers. This allows consumers to conduct money transfers while shopping for groceries, pharmacy items, or other goods. The integration with established retailers like CVS and Walmart also provides brand familiarity and convenience for customers already patronizing these stores.

MoneyGram's effectiveness depends heavily on partner location availability and hours in your specific area. While the network is extensive in urban areas like Atlanta, suburban or rural customers may face limited options. The company does not disclose fee structures, transfer speed details, or exchange rates on its location finder page, requiring customers to contact individual locations or visit the website for pricing information. As a money transfer service rather than a financial institution, MoneyGram does not offer banking products, credit services, or financial counseling.
address: 4620, 2132 Campbellton Rd SW suite E, Atlanta, GA 30311

company_info.headquarters: 4620, 2132 Campbellton Rd SW suite E, Atlanta, GA 30311

pros: 42+ locations across Atlanta through established partner retailers (CVS, Walmart, Ace Cash Express)
Extended operating hours at many locations, with some open until 11:00 PM
Both online and in-person transfer options available
Easy-to-use location finder tool searchable by address, city, state, or ZIP code
Operates through trusted retail partners, adding convenience to routine shopping
Centralized customer service line available at (800) 746-7287
cons: Service fees and exchange rates not disclosed on website; customers must contact locations for pricing
Dependent on third-party partner hours and availability—service not available 24/7 at all locations
Limited transparency about transfer speed and delivery methods on the location-finder page
No direct customer service at MoneyGram locations; all locations are franchises or partner businesses
Geographic coverage varies significantly by area—rural locations may have minimal availability
best_for: Consumers in urban/suburban areas like Atlanta seeking convenient in-person money transfers
Customers who want to combine money transfer services with routine retail shopping
People sending money domestically or internationally who prefer established retail partnerships
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for Atlanta-area consumers seeking convenient in-person or online money transfers through familiar retail partners. The primary caveat is that the service operates entirely through third-party franchises with variable hours and fee structures that must be confirmed directly with each location.
services: Location finder tool (address, city, state, ZIP search)
Partner retail location access (CVS, Walmart, Ace Cash Express, independent check-cashers)
